title: lens ervoides var. aristata
intro: Lens ervoides var. aristata, also known as Aristata or Wild Lentil, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Fabaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various gastrointestinal issues, such as dyspepsia and indigestion, due to its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lens ervoides var. aristata include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in herbal medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
